buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && cp -r web/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp -r assets dist/assets

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.anthropic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
